title: mentzelia micrantha var. stricta
intro: Mentzelia micrantha var. stricta, also known as the strict yellow blazing star or desert blazing star, is a rare flowering plant species in the phlox family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mentzelia micrantha var. stricta include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it can also be dried and used in herbal supplements.
